_comment: Every *:allow escape-hatch annotation on a data-integrity lint guard (lint-lua:allow, pcall:allow, catch:allow, lint-webpack-cache:allow, lint-test-grounding:allow, lint-doc-refs:allow) MUST be enumerated here, or lint-allow-manifest.mjs FAILS. Adding an entry is a deliberate, reviewable act requiring ORCHESTRATOR/OWNER approval BEFORE the PR opens (memory: lint-allows-are-escalations; the PR #75 incident). The manifest must match reality EXACTLY — a removed annotation must also be removed here, in the same reviewed commit. Counts are per (file, marker).

entries.reason: err_pause and err_loc are both logged jointly in the else branch below — not a swallow
selftest must restore SurfaceLock/storage before reporting the exception

(1) unlock tripwire compares STORED snapshots, not live platform.name — not rename-vulnerable; (2) sanctioned name→index resolver at the ADMIN tooling boundary, fails loud on ambiguity — the owner-approved exception to identity=surface.index
entries.approver: baseline (pre-manifest, audited 2026-07-07; both re-verified in the #60/#61 review cycle)
